name: Banco ABC Brasil S.A.
summary: Banco ABC Brasil S.A., a commercial bank, provides various financial products and services large companies in Brazil and internationally. It offers current accounts; loan products, such as company check, working capital, and foreign currency loans; advances against receivables; and agribusiness loans, as well as housing finance; payment; and Internet banking services. The company also provides export and import foreign trade finance products; onlending products; guarantees; and derivatives. In addition, it offers investment products, such as bank deposit certificate, agribusiness letters of credit, letter of mortgage lending, real estate finance, and structured transactions. Further, the company provides customized advisory services to coordinate, execute, and negotiate acquisitions, disinvestments, investments, mergers, and corporate reorganizations, as well as offers capital market services for promissory notes, debentures, receivables certificates, market distribution, and structured loans. It operates branches in Brazil, as well as through an overseas branch located in Georgetown, the Cayman Islands. The company was formerly known as Banco Roma de Investimentos and changed its name to Banco ABC Brasil S.A. in 1997. Banco ABC Brasil S.A. was incorporated in 1983 and is based in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil. Banco ABC Brasil S.A. is a subsidiary of Arab Banking Corporation.
